title: Tai Chi
description: Embrace the flow of natural body movements to develop strength, flexibility and a peaceful state of mind. From energetic routines to slow, serene sequences, Yoga classes balance movement and meditation to help you feel better inside and out.

title: Power Pump
description: Get your body pumping to a driving beat with one of our motivating pump fitness classes. Fusing high-energy routines with challenging weights, our pump workouts are a full-body blast that will put you on the fast track to fitness.

title: Legs, Bums and Tums
description:
Join us for a fantastic group exercise session at South Norwood Leisure Centre. Here’s a glimpse of our schedule for fitness classes:

Fitness Classes:

  • Group Cycle
    Time: 06:45 - 07:30
    Duration: 45min
    Instructor: Sue
    Location: Studio 2, South Norwood Leisure Centre
    Spaces Available: 1
  • Power Pump

    Spaces Available: 11

    Spaces Available: 1
  • Seated Exercise Class
    Time: 13:45 - 14:45
    Duration: 60min

    Location: Studio 1, South Norwood Leisure Centre

  • Aqua Aerobics
    Time: 15:15 - 16:00
    Duration: 45min
    Instructor: Karen
    Location: Main Pool, South Norwood Leisure Centre

  • Body Conditioning
    Time: 18:30 - 19:30
    Duration: 60min
    Instructor: Sue
    Location: Studio 1, South Norwood Leisure Centre

  • Mindfulness

    Spaces Available: 8

Each class aims to provide a comprehensive workout to suit various fitness levels. Book now!

title: Pilates
description: Gently train your physique and improve core strength in a calming, yet challenging atmosphere. Pilates exercises focus on lengthening and strengthening muscles while challenging the core, to build a revived and resilient you.

Seated Exercise Class. Benefits are both socially and for health. Improve weight loss, aids falls prevention through strength and conditioning and a great way to keep your focus. Meet new friends and boost your mood and your energy.

Class Schedule:

  • 10:30 - 11:30 (60min) - Power Pump with Abbie in Studio 1. 1 space available.

Mindfulness is a relaxing and self-focused class, where you will experience a range of guided meditations and learn the importance of being ‘still’. Mindfulness is the ability to be fully present and aware of where we are and what we’re doing, without being overly reactive or overwhelmed.
